title: Add combined champion timeline chart
description: Add a scorecard-level combined timeline chart to ScoreChampionVersionTimeline when more than one score is present.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented a combined ScoreChampionVersionTimeline chart that renders only when multiple scores are present. The combined chart reuses the shared x-axis/chart styling and aggregates champion-change markers without tooltips or marker hover titles. Focused Jest test and dashboard typecheck passed.
